diagrams.title: Exception Handling Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how exception propagates from throw through stack unwinding to catch handler
diagrams.purpose: Understanding exception propagation and stack unwinding mechanism

diagrams.title: Standard Exception Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing std::exception as root with logic_error and runtime_error branches
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing standard exception class relationships and when to use each

diagrams.title: Catch Block Matching Order
diagrams.description: Shows multiple catch blocks and which exception type each would catch in order
diagrams.purpose: Understanding exception matching rules and catch block ordering best practices
